notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Payton Tolle.

notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras grounds into a double play, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Josh Bell. Wilyer Abreu out at 2nd. Willson Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by pitcher Connor Prielipp. Nick Sogard scores. Carlos Narváez to 3rd. Caleb Durbin to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida grounds out, second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens.
